name: grok-codex
description: Delegate coding tasks and reviews to Grok Build with live ACP activity progress.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate to Grok Build with live activity progress.
interface.longDescription: Run Grok Build as a companion coding agent from Codex for implementation, diagnosis, and review workflows, with a local ACP activity stream showing readable thoughts, plans, tool activity, notifications, and Markdown results.
defaultPrompt: Use Grok to investigate this difficult coding problem.
Ask Grok to review my current working tree.
Run an adversarial Grok review of this branch.
